headline: Merger markup: BNSF hiked grain train charges as much as 472%, UP says in complaint
summary: Union Pacific filed a complaint with federal regulators alleging that BNSF Railway’s cancellation of certain reciprocal switching rates has significantly increased costs for grain shippers. The post Merger markup: BNSF hiked grain train charges as much as 472%, UP says in complaint appeared first on FreightWaves.

headline: Dan Loeb Dumps Microsoft, Slashes Nvidia And Rail Stocks In Sweeping Q1 Portfolio Overhaul
summary: Daniel Loeb's Third Point added Meta, Alphabet, Broadcom, and semiconductor names while sharply cutting Nvidia and Microsoft positions in Q1.
